task: VEP-C (OT transfer) — predict GWAS fine-mapped causal probability for TraitGym complex_traits_matched_9 test variants

external_resources.name: ENCODE cCRE combined (cell-type agnostic)
external_resources.use: regulatory-element overlap, type flags, and log-distance to nearest PLS/ELS/CTCF element

external_resources.name: hg38 reference genome
external_resources.use: ref/alt sequence windows for Enformer + GC/CpG/transition context

external_resources.name: Enformer (enformer-pytorch)
external_resources.use: allele-specific regulatory-effect delta (ref vs alt), 5313 human tracks

notes: No TraitGym-labeled files were fetched. Test-set variant positions used only to decide which features to extract for inference, never for training.
Model trained solely on train.parquet with chromosome-grouped 5-fold validation.
